summary: Frontend-only testing completed for navigation fixes in Gerenciamento module. All 8 navigation features tested and working correctly. The global navigation fix was verified - all navigate() calls now use the /gerenciamento/ prefix correctly instead of redirecting to /select-system.

minor.issue: Shows 'Erro ao carregar dashboard' toast but data loads correctly - may be a timing issue

passed_tests: Login with test@test.com / password - SUCCESS - Redirects to /select-system
Dashboard: Click on recent maintenance - Navigates to /gerenciamento/maintenances/{id} - SUCCESS
Machines Page: Sidebar navigation - Navigates to /gerenciamento/machines - SUCCESS
Machines Page: Click 'Ver' button - Navigates to /gerenciamento/machines/{id} - SUCCESS
Maintenances Page: Click 'Ver' button - Navigates to /gerenciamento/maintenances/{id} - SUCCESS
Obras Page: Click 'Detalhes' button - Navigates to /gerenciamento/obras/{id} - SUCCESS
Horímetro Page: Loads correctly at /gerenciamento/horimetro - SUCCESS
Combustível Page: Loads correctly at /gerenciamento/combustivel - SUCCESS
Balance Page: Click on machine expense - Navigates to /gerenciamento/machines/{id} - SUCCESS
Notifications Page: Click 'Ver Máquina' - Navigates to /gerenciamento/machines/{id} - SUCCESS
critical_code_review_comments: All navigation paths now correctly use /gerenciamento/ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All navigation fixes verified working. The global fix applied by main agent corrected all navigate() calls from using '/machines/', '/maintenances/', '/obras/' to using '/gerenciamento/machines/', '/gerenciamento/maintenances/', '/gerenciamento/obras/'. No redirects to /select-system occur anymore when clicking detail buttons. Pages tested: Dashboard, Machines, Maintenances, Obras, Horímetro, Combustível, Balance, Notifications.
